title: jasione perennis subsp. carpetana
intro: Jasione perennis subsp. carpetana, commonly known as the Pyrenean blue-sowthistle or Pyrenean Jasione, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Jasione perennis subsp. carpetana include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
